features.name: concatenation with unsized zero literal on unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a concatenation operator combining an unsized zero literal '0 with an unpacked multi-dimensional array data type
features.snippet:
input logic [3:0] [2:0] [1:0] data2;
wire [24:0] combined = {'0, data2};

features.name: ternary conditional with asymmetric width branches
features.description: Code should include a ternary conditional operator where the true branch is a concatenation of an unpacked array and the false branch is a concatenation with a zero literal padding to match width

features.name: unpacked array slice assignment
features.description: Code should include an assignment to a slice of an unpacked array where the slice width differs from the source expression width
